/.title: Top Builder Season 2 by PlebLab | Bitcoin Innovation Event Presented by Timestamp
/.description: Join Top Builder Season 2, a PlebLab event presented by Timestamp. Compete, innovate, and showcase projects advancing the Bitcoin and Lightning Network ecosystems with groundbreaking technical solutions and unique business models.
h2: All builders win by gaining exposure, mentorship, and collaboration opportunities in the Bitcoin ecosystem. Only one can be Top Builder.
The final round saw standout teams like Clams, Coracle, BitScript, Shopstr, and CASCDR each bringing unique ideas and contributing to the innovation within the Bitcoin ecosystem.
Still not convinced?We’ve got the answers
h3: Advisor at Ego Death Capital, Base58
CTO of BitEscrow, FOSS Engineer at PlebLab
Founder and CEO of Stacker News
UX/UI of Voltage, Co-Founder of ATL BitLab
Engineer at Zaprite, FOSS Engineer at PlebLab
Developer Relations Engineer at Voltage / Founder & Instructor of PlebDevs
p: Are you the next Top Builder?
Build with a community of experienced builders. Take advantage of all the resources needed to build your killer app.
